questions.q: Unveiled for the first time in April 2026 to mark the book's centenary, newly discovered preliminary pencil sketches of Winnie-the-Pooh were drawn by which original illustrator?
Which two actresses were newly announced as the leads for Disney’s upcoming animated feature 'Hexed'?
In April 2026, President Trump was expected to sign an executive order urging increased research into which psychedelic substance?

An April 2026 report highlighting the mass sale of AI-generated books compared the trend to George Orwell's '1984' and specifically noted thousands of Amazon titles had been 'polished' by which AI writing tool?
On April 16, 2026, over 100 writers walked out of which historic French publishing house in protest of its conservative billionaire owner, Vincent Bolloré?
Which cabinet official was heavily grilled by Congress on April 16, 2026, regarding his stance on vaccines and proposed cuts to the federal health budget?
According to producer Emma Thomas, what was confirmed about Christopher Nolan's upcoming film 'The Odyssey'?
options: It will have a runtime under 3 hours
It will be filmed entirely in black and white
It will have a PG rating
questions.correctText: It will have a runtime under 3 hours

questions.q: Which major streaming service co-founder announced their official exit from the company in mid-April 2026?
Who recently won his 6th Art Ross Trophy as the NHL's leading scorer, tying Gordie Howe and Mario Lemieux for the second-most all-time?
Which nation recently abandoned its plans to host the 2035 Rugby World Cup amid funding cutbacks?
